trigger_condition: LBJ/USA-NPN/iNaturalist flowers active, but local insect observations are low
required_data: plant_clock_hays + iNaturalist/GBIF insect observations + USA-NPN phenophase
public_message: Flowers are open. Watch whether bees, flies, butterflies, beetles, and wasps are actually visiting them.
confidence_logic: starts C; upgrades to B/A with local observation confirmation

public_message: Recent rain may trigger germination, fresh growth, blooms, fungi, or insect activity.

trigger_condition: PRISM max temperature anomaly high during active bloom window
public_message: Heat may shorten bloom windows. Watch whether flowers fade quickly or seed set looks weak.

trigger_condition: milkweed active but monarch observations missing/low
public_message: Milkweeds are ready. Watch whether monarchs, queen butterflies, and milkweed insects appear at the same time.
confidence_logic: B with local milkweed and monarch observations

trigger_condition: insect-eating birds active while insect/caterpillar observations are low
public_message: Insect-eating birds may need caterpillars, beetles, flies, and other soft-bodied insects now.
confidence_logic: C until local insect abundance proxy added

trigger_condition: plants in seed window + seed-eating bird groups present
public_message: Seed heads are habitat. Leaving them standing can feed birds and shelter insects.
confidence_logic: B from plant/bird clock; A when local observation confirmed
